doc.launch: The bundled source-built SDL frontend receives --fullscreen and exactly one positional ROM appended by the launcher. No host executable, Flatpak, libretro core, or prebuilt binary is permitted.
doc.state: PPSSPP maps $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/ppsspp to isolated Semu state. Generated settings live in PSP/SYSTEM, game saves in PSP/SAVEDATA, save states in PSP/PPSSPP_STATE, and cache/screenshots remain below the same isolated root.
doc.sandbox: The package, ROM library, and external Emulation tree are read-only. PPSSPP can write only its per-emulator state root; external ROM, BIOS, and save trees are never modified.
doc.input: Pad zero is PPSSPP's SDL GameController lane for the Steam Virtual Gamepad. PSP controls are explicit, Semu keymap actions compile to PPSSPP chords, and the target process-group watcher owns immediate physical Start+Select termination.
doc.rendering: The managed profile pins OpenGL. The source-built package directly links libsemurenderer and submits the final PSP image before PPSSPP UI, then submits the completed UI immediately before the real present task. No inactive report or display/session branch is emulator-owned.
